description:
Add `aot` to `# paths:` for every fixture whose semantics don't depend on concurrency. As each one passes, leave it pinned in the index.

## Acceptance

- All non-concurrent fixtures are `# paths: jit, interp, aot`.
- Concurrency-using fixtures still pending fz-ul4.23.6.6.
title: AOT three-path graduation: roll out aot to every scalar fixture
